name: spec_completeness_check
description: Validates that a spec .md file contains all required sections for its declared ticket type.

name: static_analysis_check
description: Runs mandatory static analysis bundle: ruff, mypy, bandit, vulture, import-linter, semgrep, wemake (Python); eslint + plugins (TypeScript); gdformat, gdlint (Godot); jscpd (duplication). Shadow mode only in M902; enforcement deferred to M903.

name: governance_check
description: Automated enforcement of governance rules for multi-agent handoffs across six categories: architecture (dependency direction, layer boundaries), exception safety (bare except, silent swallowing), reflection safety (getattr/setattr scoping), async safety (blocking I/O in async), observability (structured logging), governance integrity (bypass prevention). Detects 30+ rules with suppressibility mechanics.

name: planner_check
description: Detects cyclic dependencies, self-loops, and orphaned dependencies in ticket dependency graphs. Parses milestone folder for .md files with YAML-style dependencies field and runs DFS cycle detection.

name: reviewer_check
description: Scans staged git changes for new TODO/FIXME/HACK/XXX/KLUDGE comments and suppressions without issue links (# noqa, # pylint, etc.). Gracefully handles unavailable git.

name: learning_check
description: Scans learning output files under project_board/checkpoints/ for forbidden phrases (hack, temporary, XXX, KLUDGE, etc.) defined by YAML policy. Prevents codifying hacks and workarounds in documented learning.
